info.title: Public API
info.description: Description of Public API for Unitrends MSP.

get.summary: Returns the version of the latest agent and the link to download it.
Returns a list of appliance details based on filtering, ordering and paging criteria.
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the appliance. All of the appliances that at least contain part of the passed parameter will be filtered.

parameters.name: is_online
parameters.description: Flag that indicates whether appliance is online. True means online.

parameters.name: total_mb_size_from
parameters.description: Minimum size of storage attached to the appliance in MB.

parameters.name: total_mb_size_to
parameters.description: Maximum size of storage attached to the appliance in MB.

parameters.name: total_mb_free_from
parameters.description: Minimum amount of free space on storage attached to the appliance in MB.

parameters.name: total_mb_free_to
parameters.description: Maximum amount of free space on storage attached to the appliance in MB.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the appliance. All of the appliances that at least contain part of the passed parameter will be filtered.

parameters.name: helix_status
parameters.description: The status of helix for the appliances.

get.summary: Returns a list of asset details based on filtering, ordering and paging criteria.
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the asset. All of the asset that contain passed parameter will be in filtered result.

parameters.name: mac
parameters.description: The MAC address of the asset.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: This parameter allows to include additional data to the response. To use it please add to the query parameters one or multiple of the following: "?include[backups]=last&include[links]=all"

get.summary: Returns a list of BackupIQ alerts based on filtering, ordering and paging criteria.
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: is_muted
parameters.description:
Indicates that alert is muted on UI by settings of alerts specified on the portal.
Muted alerts are not displayed on the portal UI.
API returns not muted alerts by default.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

parameters.name: customer_name
parameters.description: The name of the customer. All of the customers that contain passed parameter will be in filtered result.

parameters.name: appliance_name
parameters.description: The name of the appliance. All of the appliances that contain passed parameter will be in filtered result.

parameters.name: asset_name
parameters.description: The name of the asset. All of the asset that contain passed parameter will be in filtered result.

parameters.name: asset_key
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset.

parameters.name: job_name
parameters.description: The name of the job. All of the jobs that contain passed parameter will be in filtered result.

parameters.name: job_type
parameters.description: The type of the job. All of the jobs that contain passed parameter will be in filtered result.

parameters.name: is_dismissed
parameters.description:
Flag that indicates dismiss status of an alert. It means whether a user dismissed an alert in BackupIQ interface.
The absence of the parameter leads to both dismissed and not dismissed alerts in the filtered result.

parameters.name: created_time_direction
parameters.description: Direction of ordering by created_time field, which always the second ordering field. E.g. "asc", "desc".

get.summary: Returns a list of backup details based on filtering, ordering and paging criteria.
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

parameters.name: asset_key
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset.

get.summary: Returns a list of customer details based on filtering, ordering and paging criteria.
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the customer in the UUID format.

get.summary: Returns a list of spanning domain/tenant users
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

get.summary: Returns a list of spanning domain/tenant users
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

get.summary: Returns a list of spanning domains/tenants
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: This parameter allows to exclude the data from the response. To use it please add to the query parameters one or multiple of the following: "?include[users]=false"

get.summary: Returns a list of Microsoft Entra ID domains/tenants
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

get.summary: Returns a list of spanning domains/tenants
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: This parameter allows to exclude the data from the response. To use it please add to the query parameters one or multiple of the following: "?include[users]=false"

get.summary: Returns a list of asset details based on filtering, ordering and paging criteria.
get.description: Visibility is restricted by tenant which issued credentials for access.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

customerId.description: The id of the customer in the UUID format.

timeZoneOffsetMinutes.description: Asset time zone offset from UTC

version.description: The version of the latest agent.

downloadLocation.description: The link to download the latest agent package.

checksum.description: The hash code for agent file.

customer_id.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

is_online.description: Flag that indicates whether appliance is online. True means online.

total_mb_size.description: The size of storage attached to the appliance in MB.

total_mb_free.description: The amount of free space on storage attached to the appliance in MB.

href.description: Specifies the URL the link goes to.

customer_id.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

mac.description: The MAC address of the asset.

key.description: The unique identifier of the asset.

links.description:
Links to other resources in API or web application user interface.
This field is not present by default.
If application should return this additional links payload, request should contain query parameter "?include[links]=all"

size.description: The size of the backup in MB.

customer_id.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

message.example: The asset backup was not created for the last 1 hour(s).

is_dismissed.description: Flag that indicates dismiss status of an alert. It means whether a user dismissed an alert in BackupIQ interface.

is_muted.description: Flag indicates that alert is muted on UI by settings of alerts specified on the portal.

interrogation_message.description: The result of interrogation for alert underlying reason.
interrogation_message.example: Appliance is offline. Backups have not been running as a result. Open appliance details page and check that the appliance is powered on and connected to the network. If the problem persists, please open a support case.

customer_id.description: The id of the customer in UUID format.

size.description: The size of the backup in MB.

asset_key.description: The unique identifier of the asset.

id.description: The id of the customer in the UUID format.

lastContactBackupTimestamp.description: Timestamp of last backup for contact

lastCalendarBackupTimestamp.description: Timestamp of last backup for calendar

lastDriveBackupTimestamp.description: Timestamp of last backup for drive

numberOfProtectedStandardUsers.description: Number of standard licenses in use

numberOfUnprotectedUsers.description: Number of unprotected users in the org

numberOfProtectedSharePointSites.description: Number of protected SharePoint sites in the org

numberOfUnprotectedSharePointSites.description: Number of unprotected SharePoint sites in the org

numberOfProtectedTeamChannels.description: Number of protected Team channels in the org

numberOfUnprotectedTeamChannels.description: Number of unprotected Team channels in the org

numberOfSharedMailboxesTotal.description: Number of shared mailboxes in total

numberOfProtectedStandardSharedMailboxes.description: Number of unprotected standard shared mailboxes

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example value: "Bearer {token}"
Bearer.name: Authorization
